---
title: "update_gemini_manifest.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/update_gemini_manifest.py"
loc: 84
complexity: 11
logic_score: 1.72
style_score: 4.07
intel_score: 3.30
overall_score: 3.11
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating ManifestOrchestrator, _get_git_summary.

## Interaction Protocol
Import ManifestOrchestrator and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 19 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `ManifestOrchestrator`
- `_get_git_summary`
- `_get_task_status`
- `execute`
